Package org.odpi.openmetadata.samples.archiveutilities.sustainability

Enum Class GlossaryCategoryDefinition

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<GlossaryCategoryDefinition>
org.odpi.openmetadata.samples.archiveutilities.sustainability.GlossaryCategoryDefinition
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<GlossaryCategoryDefinition>, Constable
public enum GlossaryCategoryDefinition extends Enum<GlossaryCategoryDefinition>
The GlossaryCategoryDefinition is used to populate the sustainability glossary.
